targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT count(*) FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT 100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'ok') / NULLIF(count(*), 0) AS pct FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, SUM(total_tokens) AS value FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT w.name AS workspace, SUM(m.cost_usd) AS cost FROM model_usage_logs m JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = m.workspace_id WHERE m.created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY w.name ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT w.name AS workspace, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(m.total_tokens), 0) / NULLIF(q.monthly_token_cap, 0), 2) AS utilization FROM workspaces w JOIN workspace_quotas q ON q.workspace_id = w.id LEFT JOIN model_usage_logs m ON m.workspace_id = w.id AND m.created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()) WHERE q.monthly_token_cap IS NOT NULL GROUP BY w.name, q.monthly_token_cap ORDER BY utilization DESC NULLS LAST
